_note: Token & provided cards for Sorcery: Contested Realm. Card entries reference cards.json by name (full data + image resolve from there via the slug). Markers are board states tracked with counters, not real cards — confirm exact wording against curiosa.io/codex.

groups.title: Token Units & Sites
groups.blurb: Cards you create, summon, or place during play. They come on box-topper and precon token sheets rather than in booster packs.

groups.title: Limited-Format Provided Cards
groups.blurb: Supplied as needed in Draft and Sealed events: the four basic draft sites, the Spellslinger avatar, and the Druid avatar.

markers.name: Tapped
markers.desc: A unit or site turned sideways to show it has been used this turn.

markers.name: Flooded
markers.desc: A site turned into a water site by an effect — it provides only Water threshold and loses its other abilities.

markers.name: Submerged
markers.desc: A unit hidden beneath the surface of a water site or void (granted by the Submerge keyword).

markers.name: Disabled
markers.desc: A permanent that can't use its abilities; track it with a counter until the effect ends.

markers.name: Ward
markers.desc: A protective marker — warded units and sites resist being targeted or destroyed by the enemy.

markers.name: Death's Door
markers.desc: An Avatar reduced to 0 life is on Death's Door; the next damage it takes loses the game.
